scenarios.title: Accidental screen crack from a drop within plan term
scenarios.description: Customer’s iPhone 13 (512 GB) was accidentally dropped causing a cracked screen. The incident occurred within 18 months of plan purchase and this is the first ADH claim.

service_fee.notes: Service fee applies for accidental damage claims as per policy section 3.2

policy_references.snippet: Apple covers accidental damage from handling during the plan term, subject to a $49 service fee and a maximum of two service events.
Customer must provide details of the accident and pay the service fee to receive coverage.

scenarios.reasoning: The cracked screen resulted from an unexpected and unintentional external event (a drop), which is covered under section 3.2. The claim is within the 24-month plan term and is the first ADH claim, so coverage applies. The $49 service fee applies as stated in section 3.2. Customer provided a detailed accident description and valid plan agreement number as required by section 7.

scenarios.title: Liquid damage from accidental spill within plan term
scenarios.description: Customer's iPhone 13 Pro suffered liquid damage after an accidental spill of coffee during normal use within the 24-month plan term.

service_fee.notes: Service fee applies for accidental damage claims as per section 3.2.

policy_references.snippet: Coverage applies to operational failure caused by accidental damage from handling such as liquid contact, subject to a $49 service fee and a maximum of two service events.
Customer must provide details of the accident and pay the service fee to receive coverage.

scenarios.reasoning: The claim involves liquid damage from an accidental spill, which is an unexpected and unintentional external event covered under section 3.2. The claim is within the 24-month plan term and the customer agrees to pay the $49 service fee, fulfilling the requirements in section 7. ADH coverage counts toward the two-event limit.
